description:
A new way to collaborate

Empowering teams by messenger, meetings, calendar, docs, and emails. It's all in one place.
Docs
- You can directly preview uploaded .html files in Feishu Drive, My Document Library, or Wiki, and switch between the rendered page and the code view. In addition, you can preview .html files in chats and documents.
Messenger
- You can use the Form feature in group chats to quickly create forms for scenarios such as event registration, feedback collection, and surveys. After designing a form, you can publish it directly and invite group members to fill it out, or share the form link or QR code with relevant members.
